name: Mandarin Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the mandarin orange segments on a paper towel for a few minutes.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and allspice.
3. Cut in the vegetable shortening using a pastry cutter or your fingers until it resembles a fine grain.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg and milk.
5. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture and mix just until combined.
6. Gently fold in the mandarin orange segments.
7. Spoon batter into a greased muffin tin, filling each cavity about two-thirds full.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
10. In a small bowl, combine the remaining cinnamon with the sugar.
11. Gently roll the tops of the hot muffins in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
12. Serve warm or at room temperature.
